name: qiwiosity
description: Qiwiosity monorepo - NZ travel app (mobile, database, content, tools).

scripts.mobile: npm run sync:mobile && npm --workspace mobile run start
scripts.mobile:ios: npm run sync:mobile && npm --workspace mobile run ios
scripts.mobile:android: npm run sync:mobile && npm --workspace mobile run android
scripts.mobile:web: npm run sync:mobile && npm --workspace mobile run web
